themes.name: Institutional Structure and Stakeholders
themes.description: Relates to government bodies, ministries, organizational frameworks involved in school eye health

themes.name: Operationalization Strategies
themes.description: Covers implementation approaches, operational plans, and strategies for delivering school eye health programs

themes.name: Coordination and Integration
themes.description: Addresses inter-agency coordination, integration of eye health into broader health and education systems

themes.name: Funding
themes.description: Concerns financial resources, budgets, funding mechanisms, and fiscal sustainability of school eye health programs

themes.name: Local Capacity and Service Delivery
themes.description: Relates to community-level capacity, local service provision, training, and delivery of eye health services in schools

themes.name: Accessibility and Inclusivity
themes.description: Concerns equitable access to eye health services, inclusivity for marginalized groups, and geographic reach

themes.name: Cost, Availability and Affordability
themes.description: Relates to costs of services and products, availability of resources, and affordability for end users

themes.name: Data Considerations
themes.description: Covers data collection, monitoring and evaluation, information systems, and evidence-based decision making

themes.name: Sociocultural Factors and Compliance
themes.description: Covers cultural beliefs, social norms, stigma, awareness, and compliance with eye health recommendations

themes.name: Services at Higher Levels of Health System
themes.description: Addresses referral pathways, secondary and tertiary care, specialist services beyond primary school-level screening

themes.name: Procuring Eyeglasses
themes.description: Addresses procurement, distribution, and supply of corrective eyeglasses for school children
